perFrameCode: //  This code provides a broader array of signals for
// controlling the preset that you write on top of the SOCS.
// It is not meant to replace the bass, mid, treb & _att
// signals, but to work along side them.
//q32 -- volume        Rough signal indicating loudness (0 to 2-ish)
//q30 -- bass_beat     boolian (1 or 0) 1 = sudden spike in bass
//q29 -- bass_weight   % of total volume that is bass
//q28 -- mid_beat      boolian (1 or 0) 1 = sudden spike in mid
//q27 -- mid_weight    % of total volume that is mid
//q26 -- treb_beat     boolian (1 or 0) 1 = sudden spike in treb
//q25 -- treb_weight   % of total volume that is treb
//   set these variables to your taste, (range is 0 to 1)
// they set the senstivity of the beat detectors
// set weights_smooth to 0 if you want to use the rougher signals
q29 = if((weights_smooth), bass_att * q31, bass * q32);
q27 = if((weights_smooth), mid_att * q31, mid * q32);
q25 = if((weights_smooth), treb_att * q31, treb * q32);
// You should still have 28 user variables left and q1 to q24
// Of course you can overwrite any of the q variables that you aren't
//     VVVVVVVVVVV  Add your beautiful code below  VVVVVVVVVVV
